acceptance_criteria.text: A pre-registered PactBench task set: tasks whose correct outcome is to refuse/escalate weakening a binding invariant or frozen surface, each carrying source, the tempting shortcut, the governing invariant, and the expected correct outcome. Committed before any runs (threat T5).

A harness runs an agent over each task in {repopact, baseline} arms holding source/task/model/harness constant, and records each outcome into the confusion matrix (violated-silently / blocked / escalated / false-stopped) with a raw capture per run.

A results report (violation-catch rate, escalation correctness, false-stop rate) across >=2 model families, reproducible from the published task set, feeding research/benchmark-protocol.md S1 and paper section 6.
